name: Avocado Toast
description: Crispy sourdough topped with creamy mashed avocado and fresh cherry tomatoes.
instructions: Toast the bread slices until golden and crisp.
Cut the avocado in half, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Add a teaspoon of lemon juice, a pinch of salt, and black pepper.
Mash until creamy but slightly chunky.
Spread the avocado mixture evenly over the toast.
Slice the cherry tomatoes and arrange on top.
Add extra pepper and serve immediately.

name: Masala Dosa
description: A South Indian classic — crisp fermented crepe filled with spiced potato masala.
instructions: Heat oil and add mustard seeds until they crackle.
Add curry leaves and sliced onions; sauté until soft.
Add turmeric and mashed potatoes; mix well.
Heat a dosa griddle and spread batter into a thin circle.
Place potato filling in the center.
Fold the dosa and serve with chutney and sambar.

name: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in a rich, spiced tomato and pepper sauce. Perfect for brunch.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Make four small wells in the sauce.
Crack an egg into each well.
Cover and cook until the egg whites are set.

name: Chicken Tikka Bowl
description: Tender spiced chicken tikka served over fragrant rice with fresh vegetables.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
Grill or bake until fully cooked.
Cook rice according to package instructions.
Arrange rice in a serving bowl.

name: Veggie Buddha Bowl
description: A nourishing bowl of quinoa, roasted vegetables, chickpeas, and creamy avocado.
instructions: Cook quinoa and allow it to cool slightly.
Roast broccoli and carrots until tender.
Place quinoa in the bowl as the base.
Arrange vegetables and chickpeas in sections.

name: Thai Green Curry
description: A fragrant coconut curry with vegetables and your choice of tofu or chicken.
instructions: Heat a pan and fry green curry paste for 1 minute.
Add coconut milk and stir until smooth.

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Perfectly grilled salmon with Nordic-inspired herbs and a light citrus finish.
instructions: Rub with olive oil, herbs, salt, and pepper.
Grill salmon skin-side down for 4–5 minutes.
Flip carefully and cook until flaky.
Serve salmon with vegetables and lemon wedges.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Rich and creamy tomato-based curry with soft paneer cubes and warm spices.
instructions: Sauté onions and tomatoes until soft.
Pour in the puree and simmer.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Quick and colorful wok-tossed vegetables in a savory garlic-ginger sauce.
instructions: Add minced garlic and stir-fry briefly.
Add carrots and cook for 2 minutes.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Classic chewy cookies loaded with melty chocolate chips — always a crowd pleaser.
instructions: Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
Scoop dough onto a baking tray.
Cool on a rack before serving.
